microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model across distributed engineering teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a replicable validation framework adopted across sovereign-cloud environments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, coordinating requirements across security, networking, and infrastructure stakeholders.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring automation workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill throughput capacity by 21%, demonstrating measurable leverage of AI tooling to amplify team output and reduce manual effort.

Partnered with enterprise customers on custom evaluation configurations and post-drill remediation plans, translating complex distributed-systems failure data into clear, actionable technical guidance that accelerated customer-side remediation and deepened solution adoption.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting technical demos and hands-on training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly through repeatable, self-service tooling.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing **critical feature gaps** and translating customer requirements into actionable specifications for the engineering backlog.

Improved data integrity and accelerated retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting average lookup time by 83% and enabling faster technical evaluation by internal solution teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating technical requirements and tradeoffs across 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting **technical discovery** with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and build a roadmap to automate the highest-impact execution paths.

Enabled leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that tracked operational toil metrics across 140+ teams, turning raw execution data into a clear, repeatable decision-support tool.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping network and software dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and guiding cross-functional teams through a structured, low-risk cutover plan.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, triaging and prioritizing **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain delivery velocity throughout a complex, multi-team infrastructure migration.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable integration framework that reduced manual handoffs between technical teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that improved pipeline visibility and shortened the time from customer requirement-gathering to closed deal.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to better align technical service offerings with target customer needs.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and translating raw cost data into a clear, actionable framework that informed future proposal and scoping decisions.

'customer technical requirements' and 'proposed solutions' (JD core duty) surfaced in microsoft_ft bullet#6 ('translating complex failure data into actionable technical guidance') and pro_painters bullet#1 ('customer requirement-gathering to closed deal').

'network isolation' and 'sovereign-cloud' (JD-adjacent Zero Trust / networking vocabulary) explicitly named in microsoft_ft bullet#3 and bullet#4, mirroring Zscaler's Zero Trust Exchange and cloud-native security platform context.

'POV' and 'small to medium-sized business or enterprise accounts' (preferred qualifications) reflected in microsoft_ft bullet#1 naming enterprise accounts (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) and the platform's self-service evaluation model.

'distilling complex problems into clear, actionable plans' (JD success profile: champion simplicity) reflected in microsoft_2022 bullet#3 ('turning raw execution data into a clear, repeatable decision-support tool') and microsoft_ft bullet#6.
